desc.cn: CC-Switch 是一款跨平台桌面应用，用于统一管理和一键切换多个 AI CLI 编程助手（Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI 等）的 API 配置、MCP 服务器和 Skills。
desc.en: CC-Switch is a cross-platform desktop app for unified management and one-click switching of API configurations, MCP servers, and Skills across multiple AI CLI coding assistants.

darwin/brew.cmd: brew tap farion1231/ccswitch && brew install --cask cc-switch
